code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end

  mut p = 0
  mut n = 0
  mut token = ""
  let total = string.len(line)
  mut i = 0
  while i <= total
    mut is_sep = true
    if i < total
      let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(v)
        v
      when None
        0
      end
      if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
        is_sep = true
      else
        is_sep = false
        token = "#{token}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
      end
    end
    if is_sep
      if not string.is_empty(token)
        match string.parse_int(token)
        when Some(v)
          if v > 0
            p = p + v
          else if v < 0
            n = n + v
          end
        when None
          ()
        end
        token = ""
      end
    end
    i = i + 1
  end

  let r = p - n
  print("r=#{r}")
end
